# MCS Daily Summary - February 28, 2026

## Technical Guidance
- Provided expert guidance on computer science fundamentals and advanced topics
- Assisted with technical problem-solving and architecture design questions
- Offered recommendations for best practices in software development and system design

## Certification Exam Preparation
- Reviewed progress on current certification pursuits:
  - IELTS General (target: 7.0 for immigration preparation)
  - MBA Degree at Ningbo University (in progress)
  - Planned FRM Financial Risk Manager certification
- Discussed study strategies and resource allocation for upcoming exams
- Verified status of permanent certifications (OceanBase, TDSQL, Kylin Zhongbiao, Alibaba Cloud Server)

## Coding Interview Coaching
- Practiced algorithm and data structure problems relevant to top-tier fintech interviews
- Reviewed coding patterns and optimization techniques for technical interviews
- Discussed behavioral interview preparation specific to Ant Group and similar organizations

## System Design Reviews
- Analyzed system architecture for scalability and performance
- Reviewed microservices design principles and implementation strategies
- Discussed real-time feature engineering approaches for fintech applications

## Career Development Advice
- Evaluated career trajectory progression from Wensi → Yuxin → Suyin → Ant Group
- Discussed strategies for becoming a top expert at a top-tier financial institution
- Reviewed technical portfolio development through ITBlock repository and work documentation

## Technical Projects Support
- Provided feedback on ONE Project (`/Users/hope/IdeaProjects/one/2.master/2.1mcs`)
- Assisted with documentation of work experience at major companies
